tool.name: analyze_image
tool.description: Analyze screen content from an image URL or local image path using an OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint. This tool is available only in GENERAL mode.

parameter.name: image_url
parameter.description: HTTP(S) image URL. If provided, this is used with priority over image_path.

parameter.name: image_path
parameter.description: Optional absolute image path. Used when image_url is omitted.

parameter.name: analysis_prompt
parameter.description: Optional custom instruction for image analysis.

returns.description: Returns success flag, analysis_text, source, screenshot_path, screenshot image data, and vision model/base metadata.

tool.notes: - Prefer this tool when a task requires visual interpretation of on-screen content. - image_url has priority over image_path. - If neither image_url nor image_path is provided, the tool returns an error. - If a direct image URL is already available, call this tool directly with image_url. - Do not use browser navigation or terminal download commands before calling this tool for direct image URLs. - `inspect_screen` is deprecated; use `analyze_image` only.
